# Mushbloom – AI Automation Agency & LLM Visibility Experts

> Mushbloom is a UK-based AI automation agency specializing in AI workforce deployment, LLM SEO optimization (LLMboost), niche press release distribution (Mushbloom Newswire), and custom web development.

## Core Services

### LLMboost – AI Search Visibility Accelerator
LLMboost is Mushbloom's proprietary service that optimizes brands for visibility in AI-powered search results including ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity. It focuses on Share of Model (SOM) optimization, entity-rich content creation, and authority building so that AI assistants cite and recommend the client's brand as the default answer in their industry.

What's included:
- LLM SEO Audit: Comprehensive analysis of brand presence across all major AI models
- Quiz-Based Visibility Scoring: Proprietary system measuring AI-generated answer frequency
- Content & Entity Optimization: Structured content for maximum LLM citation
- Industry Benchmarking: Competitive analysis across traditional and AI search
- Share of Model Strategy: Step-by-step roadmap to dominate LLM-powered results
- Implementation & Monitoring: Ongoing optimization as AI models evolve

Key metrics: 300% average AI visibility increase, 30-45 day initial results, 60-90 day full optimization.

Ideal for: SaaS & tech companies, professional services (legal, finance, healthcare), eCommerce brands, agencies & consultancies.

### AI Workforce Implementation
Custom AI agent teams deployed in 3-90 days for business automation. Specialties include deal sourcing, due diligence, customer support, sales qualification, and content generation. Performance guarantee: 37% operational cost reduction within 90 days.

Service pillars:
- Custom AI Agents: 24/7 agents for CRM, support, and sales
- Automation Ecosystems: End-to-end business process automation
- AI-Powered Funnels: Real-time adaptive sales optimization
- AI Agent Teams: Specialized departmental AI workforces
- Neural Copywriting: AI content generation with brand voice understanding

### Mushbloom Newswire – Niche PR Distribution
Targeted press release distribution across five verticals with guaranteed homepage placements and same-day distribution:
- CryptoWire: Blockchain, DeFi, Web3, exchange listings, token launches
- CyberWire: Cybersecurity tools, breaches, compliance, vendor news
- FinanceWire: Fintech, banking, funding rounds, investing
- GamingWire: PC/console/mobile games, esports, studio announcements
- PlayWire: iGaming, betting, casinos, affiliate partnerships

How it works: Pick track → Draft & approve → Distribute instantly → Track results with dashboard report.

## Portfolio
Mushbloom has designed and developed 27+ websites and platforms across multiple industries:
- Real Estate: Realto.ro, Realto.org, Realtoos.com, SignatureProperty.group, KBC Real Estate
- Media: Uniplus Radio, Uniplus TV
- Blockchain: CoinCruncher.com, Date with Blockchain, Bitcoin Bucharest, CCFI Token
- Events: Blockchain Week RO, Fintech Week RO, WebX Summit
- Fintech: RaidaPay
- Gaming: BlastyBoi, Aylin the Gamer
- AI: Roksolana.ai
- Tech: TMRW.ae, Nexus by TMRW
- Business: Business Hackers, Sarax.ae
- Education: Codul Copiilor de Succes
- E-Commerce: Tezaoro
- Travel: The Globtrotters
- Personal Brand: Adrian Taylor

## Knowledge Hub
30 expert articles covering AI automation across investment, startups, crypto, compliance, marketing, healthcare, finance, cybersecurity, manufacturing, legal, and gaming industries.

- Founded: 2024
